name: OSTERIA LUA
tagline: Rustic Italian cooking from an open kitchen in the heart of Bristol — hand-rolled pasta, wood-fired mains, and a short, honest wine list.
registeredAddress: 12 Cotham Hill, Bristol BS6 6LA, United Kingdom
pageTitle: OSTERIA LUA — Italian Restaurant in Bristol
menuIntroText: Seasonal, regional Italian cooking. Pasta rolled fresh each morning; mains from the wood fire. Ask about the daily specials.

items.name: Burrata & Peach
items.desc: Creamy burrata, roasted peach, basil oil, toasted sourdough.

items.name: Bruschetta di Pomodoro
items.desc: Sourdough, vine tomatoes, garlic, aged balsamic.

items.name: Arancini
items.desc: Saffron risotto balls, smoked mozzarella, lemon aioli.

items.name: Pappardelle al Ragù
items.desc: Slow-cooked beef & pork ragù, parmesan, parsley.

items.name: Wood-fired Sea Bass
items.desc: Whole Cornish sea bass, fennel, lemon, olive oil.

items.name: Pollo alla Diavola
items.desc: Spatchcock chicken, rosemary, chilli, charred lemon.

reviews.name: Hannah Reed
reviews.text: The ragù is the best I've had outside Italy. Cosy room, brilliant front of house.

reviews.name: Tom Ashby
reviews.text: Took my mum for her birthday. Wood-fired sea bass was perfect. Already booked again.

reviews.name: Priya N.
reviews.text: Small, warm, unpretentious. The wine pairing suggestions were spot on.

reservationNote: Tables up to 6 can book online. For larger parties or private hire, call us on +44 117 924 3310.
screenshotsIntro: A small room on Cotham Hill — candlelight, the hum of the wood fire, and the clink of glasses from the wine wall.
footerNote: © OSTERIA LUA. Crafted with care in Bristol.
